creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text: I think your analysis is correct and this hasn't shown up because this script rarely has any impact.  All of the Java versions available have javavmwrapper as a dependency, so it is installed before them, and, as you may have noticed, /usr/local/etc/javavms is not removed when the package is removed.  So it is only significant during a forced deinstall/reinstall, which I imagine very few users do.
